summary: Adjusted the opening to carry forward Cora's wiped window from Chapter 1 and added a final pre-dawn town-routine sentence to hand off more cleanly toward Hester's Chapter 3 opening, while leaving all chapter beats and scene causality intact.
edits: Reframed the opening around the front-room window's wiped oval to strengthen continuity with the previous chapter.
Removed the now-redundant repeated window description a few paragraphs later.
Added a final sentence tying Thea's dawn decision to Hester's bakery and the post office's morning rhythm to smooth the transition into the next chapter.
